en: Betty Botter bought some butter, but she said the butter's bitter.
ko: Betty Botter bought some butter, but she said the butter's bitter.
ja: ベティ・ボッターはバターを買いましたが、バターは苦いと言いました。
zhTW: 貝蒂·博特買了一些黃油，但她說黃油很苦。
vi: Betty Botter mua một ít bơ nhưng cô ấy nói bơ đắng.
